title: MacOS opens item links in default browser instead of in the MacOs app
excerpt:

…

posts.author: gdh (Guillaume)
posts.cookedHtml:
HI All,

I get this annoying behavior.

Each time :

  • I click on Monday.com link in a team chat (Slack or Teams for instance)
  • MacOS will open it in my default browser (in a new tab)

Contexte :

  • Using macOS (up to date)
  • Monday.com macos app is installed.

I wish it could open in the Monday.com app instead of my browser. At the end of the day, I end up with too many session of monday.com opened in my browser for nothing.

Maybe there is a trick or a setting to tweak in macOs to change that behavior ?

Thank you for your help,

Guillaume

posts.author: Matias.Monday (Matias)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hello there @gdh,

I don’t know of a mac workaround to change that behavior. Thank you for bringing this as a request!

Everyone remember you can vote for this at the top of the screen!

Cheers,
Matias

posts.author: Anidion (Ben)
posts.cookedHtml: Same behaviour on Windows, would love if this was addressed!

posts.author: jpanks (Jessica)
posts.cookedHtml: Trying to get this back up to the top of the issues board!!! SO VOTE FOR THIS!!! When using slack on my mac, any link that is sent for a board or team on Monday opens an external browser instead of opening the app. There also is nowhere on the app to plug in a link or search for said board/team link. I can’t believe this is still not a feature? It is a horrible user experience to try to run down what board it is and where it is on Monday, to then be able to open and find it on the desktop app. Then I have a bunch of external open Monday windows for no reason. Please fix!

posts.author: dude (Rashid)
posts.cookedHtml:
Just wanted to bump this to the top again and also help, hopefully, by adding a link to Apple’s Developer Xcode docs that shows how to add universal links. Please work on this. I love the Monday app, and just want to help make it even better.

@Matias.Monday

Apple Developer Documentation

Allowing apps and websites to link to your content | Apple Developer...

Use universal links to link directly to content within your app and share data securely.
